title: Continuing the Suspension of Duty-Free De Minimis Treatment for All Countries
summary: Executive Order 14388, published on April 9, 2026, republices Executive Order 14324 and continues the suspension of duty-free de minimis treatment for all countries. This action is taken to address national emergencies related to illicit drug flow, border security, synthetic opioid supply chains, and trade deficits. The order mandates that U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) collect duties on shipments sent through the international postal network, applying rates from a February 20, 2026 proclamation. This suspension applies to all shipments not covered by specific national security exceptions, regardless of value, country of origin, or transportation method. The order also revises duty collection processes for postal shipments and clarifies implementation details, effective February 24, 2026.
